components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Navigation breadcrumb showing current location in hierarchy (e.g., Org > Projects)
components.html_snippet: /Projects

components.name: sidebar-nav-item
components.description: Navigation item in sidebar with icon, label, and active state indicator. Used in main navigation sidebar.
components.html_snippet: Projects

components.name: badge
components.description: Status badge or label indicator. Shows project status, environment, or other metadata.
components.html_snippet: Active

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.description: Dropdown menu triggered by button. Contains action items with icons and labels.
components.html_snippet: <button class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-md p-2 hover:bg-surface-300 text-foreground-light hover:text-foreground"><svg class="h-4 w-4"></svg></button>

components.name: modal-dialog
components.description: Modal dialog for forms, confirmations, or actions. Overlays main content with backdrop.
components.html_snippet: Modal Title

components.name: empty-state
components.description: Empty state message displayed when no data is available. Includes illustration and call-to-action.
components.html_snippet:
No projects yet

Create your first project to get started

components.name: pagination
components.description: Pagination controls for navigating through paginated data. Previous/next buttons and page indicators.
components.html_snippet: Page 1 of 5

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Placeholder animation while content is loading. Shows shimmer effect to indicate loading state.
